mapper.sql: OPERATION_ID, lg.USER_ID, USER_IP,USER_NAME, OPERATION_TYPE, OPERATION_PATH, INTERVIEWT_TIME, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, NEW_VALUE, OLD_VALUE, lg.RESERVED_FIELD1, lg.RESERVED_FIELD2, lg.RESERVED_FIELD3
mapper.insert: insert into TBL_USER_OPT_LOG (USER_ID, USER_IP, OPERATION_TYPE, OPERATION_PATH, INTERVIEWT_TIME, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, NEW_VALUE, OLD_VALUE, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3) values ( #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operationPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{interviewtTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{columnName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{newValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oldValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into TBL_USER_OPT_LOG
OPERATION_ID,
USER_ID,
USER_IP,
OPERATION_TYPE,
OPERATION_PATH,
INTERVIEWT_TIME,
TABLE_NAME,
COLUMN_NAME,

mapper.update:
update TBL_USER_OPT_LOG
USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USER_IP = #{userIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPERATION_TYPE = #{operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPERATION_PATH = #{operationPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
INTERVIEWT_TIME = #{interviewtTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
TABLE_NAME = #{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
COLUMN_NAME = #{columnName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
NEW_VALUE = #{newValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OLD_VALUE = #{oldValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where OPERATION_ID = #{operationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update TBL_USER_OPT_LOG set USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_IP = #{userIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPERATION_TYPE = #{operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPERATION_PATH = #{operationPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INTERVIEWT_TIME = #{interviewtTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, TABLE_NAME = #{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COLUMN_NAME = #{columnName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NEW_VALUE = #{newValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OLD_VALUE = #{oldValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where OPERATION_ID = #{operationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
